allow: Bash(do sed -i '' 's|<h2 id=""""|<h2 id=""""| ; s|<h2 id=""""\([^""""]*\)"""">|<h2 id=""""\1"""" class=""""animate-on-scroll slide-in-left"""">|g' "$file")
Bash(do sed -i '' 's|<div class=""""card"""">|<div class=""""card animate-on-scroll fade-in"""">|g' "$file")
Bash(do sed -i '' 's|<div class=""""login-card"""">|<div class=""""login-card animate-on-scroll scale-in"""">|g' "$file")
